datasetNotice: Seed dataset with sourced 2025 Grand Slam men's singles competition-prize rows, Australian Open 2025/2024 and Wimbledon 2025/2024 tournament-total competition-prize rows, compatible Wimbledon operating-company financial denominators, plus an explicitly labeled US Open total-player-compensation context row.
